pages.text: Appears in:$(li)Kamen Rider Outsiders (2022, web series)$(br)Health: 200

Summoned from a $(l:misc/blocks/boss_blocks#zein_boss_block)Zein Boss Block$(/l)$(br2)Special moves:$(li)Summons random final form weapons at under 100 health (93.3%) $(li)Activates Hyper Clock Up at under 100 health (7.69%)$(br2)Drops$(li)5-10 $(l:zero_one/items/hiden_metal)Hiden Metal$(/l)$(li)1-3 $(l:decade/items/blank_card)Blank Rider Cards$(/l)$(li)1 $(l:zero_one/items/progrisekeys#zein_progrisekey)Zein Progrisekey$(/l)
